> Tip: open-ended discussion, ideas, and show-and-tell belong in
> [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/shubhamkatta/plynth/discussions).
> Use this template only for a focused question with a concrete answer.

## What are you trying to do?

(Describe the end goal, not just the immediate symptom.)

## What have you already tried?

(Commands run, code written, configs tweaked. Paste relevant snippets.)
